# ANALYSIS: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE OOS Walk-Forward Validation

**Filed:** 2026-05-21  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** Stage-1 OOS validation plan + preliminary result (data-limited)  
**Status:** DRAFT — NEEDS-DATA

## Objective

Validate that the bear-only subset of v14e watcher observations maintains its win rate (WR) and Sharpe in a held-out out-of-sample window, and assess whether the promotion threshold (WR ≥ 55% over N ≥ 100 new bear-only observations) can be verified via walk-forward.

## Data sources

- Source: deduped v14e watcher observations (L67 inflation correction).  
  - Total unique bar-dates (whole history): **337 bars** (156 bear, 181 long).  
  - Bear-only WR = 55.1%, P&L = +$695.
